author: runner-2
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9): resolves the R1/R2 model-revision placeholders to exact Hugging Face revision shas, in the amendment-overlay pin-value format (bare 40-hex revision sha). Repo binding (the frozen keys name the rung, the sha names the exact snapshot): SmolLM2-135M -> repo HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-135M-Instruct, revision 12fd25f77366fa6b3b4b768ec3050bf629380bac; SmolLM2-360M -> repo HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-360M-Instruct, revision a10cc1512eabd3dde888204e902eca88bddb4951. The instruct variants are the frozen prereg's family (P1 scale rungs; design-efficiency-track.md section 4.2 F2 arms: 'SmolLM2-instruct family, harness-proven'). Both revisions resolved 2026-07-08 from the Hugging Face model API (models/<repo>?expand=sha, cross-checked against models/<repo>/refs branch main — identical). NO weights were downloaded; weight download + the staged-bytes manifest is the f2.inputs Modal-harness job, which must load exactly these revisions (from_pretrained revision=<sha>) and echo them in its manifest. For the record, the base (non-instruct) repo heads on the same date were SmolLM2-135M 93efa2f097d58c2a74874c7e644dbc9b0cee75a2 and SmolLM2-360M f8027fd0eaeea54caa13c31d31b9fdc459c38b49 (informational only, not pinned). SmolLM2-1.7B (R3, conditional extension rung + cascade large model) and the small-process-reward-model arm remain PINNED-AT-INPUTS:f2.inputs, as does pins.harness_manifest.
